name: Bundaleer Rainforest Gardens
music_notes: Outdoor rainforest garden venue with indoor reception spaces (Treetops barn). No specific noise curfew publicly listed; BYO drinks policy. Acoustic and live band setups common.

name: Hillstone St Lucia
music_notes: Golf course venue with multiple function rooms. Portable PA systems included. Capacity for large live bands. One of Brisbane's most popular wedding live music venues.

name: Riverlife Brisbane
music_notes: Four outdoor/marquee event spaces on Brisbane River. Known for live band-friendly setups on Sunset Marquee and Riverfront Deck. Outdoor venue – noise may apply in parklands context.

name: Waters Edge Weddings and Events at Portside
music_notes: Modern waterfront venue on Brisbane River. Two light-filled spaces with private balcony. Live bands and DJs accommodated in main reception hall.

name: Emporium Hotel South Bank
music_notes: 5-star hotel with Frangipani Ballroom. Pillarless interior with moveable walls. Live music and DJs commonly hosted. Indoor venue with sound system.

name: Brisbane Powerhouse
music_notes: Industrial heritage venue with multiple spaces. Pleasuredome sailcloth tent seats 150-312. Rooftop Terrace capacity 80 cocktail. PA system and microphone included. Known for live music performances – flamenco and bands mentioned in real wedding examples.

name: Stamford Plaza Brisbane
music_notes: Luxury riverside hotel with panoramic views of Brisbane River, Story Bridge and Kangaroo Point Cliffs. Multiple ballroom and function room options. Live music-friendly for weddings and corporate events.

name: Sofitel Brisbane Central
music_notes: Largest pillarless hotel ballroom in Brisbane (Ballroom Le Grand, 798sqm). Eleven versatile event spaces. Live bands and entertainment regularly hosted for weddings and corporate events.

name: The Calile Hotel
music_notes: Modern luxury hotel on James Street Precinct. Rooftop and function spaces set up for both DJs and live performers. Described by musicians as ideal for live music with urban sophistication vibe.

name: Victoria Park
music_notes: Eight unique function rooms at golf course venue with city skyline views. Marquee holds 1000 cocktail / 444 banquet. Ballroom 230 seated. Regularly hosts weddings, corporate events, and live entertainment. DJ/band setups common.

name: W Brisbane
music_notes: Great Room is pillarless 595sqm with customised LED wall lighting. SUN Deck outdoor space 250-300 guests for ceremonies and music concerts. Described as ideal for 'supercharged music concerts' and wedding events.

name: Brisbane Marriott Hotel
music_notes: Grand Ballroom 2309sqft overlooking Brisbane River. 12 sophisticated meeting rooms. Live bands and entertainment hosted in ballroom for weddings and corporate galas.

name: Wild Canary
music_notes: Botanical bistro garden wedding venue. Inbuilt and portable PA system included. Power available at Fig Tree arbour and dance floor. Live acoustic performers and bands welcome. Clear marquee with fairy lights included in packages.

name: Factory 51
music_notes: Climate-controlled, sound-engineered warehouse. Explicitly suited for live wedding music – live bands, acoustic performers, jazz-style vocals all mentioned. Industrial chic aesthetic. Sound checks beautifully for live performers.

name: Tattersall's Club
music_notes: Elegant heritage Grand Ballroom. Members club atmosphere. Live entertainment hosted for formal events. Sound system available.

name: The Warehouse Brisbane
music_notes: Industrial warehouse-style event space. Ideal for conferences, cocktail functions, product launches. Live music-friendly space with high ceilings and open layout.

name: The Fox Hotel
music_notes: Multiple function rooms near South Bank. Regular live music venue and popular for corporate and social events. Casual atmosphere with live entertainment heritage.

name: The Joinery
music_notes: Creative warehouse-style event space in West End. Product launches, workshops, creative corporate functions. Live music accommodated in open warehouse layout.

name: Lina Rooftop
music_notes: French Riviera-inspired rooftop restaurant with 180-degree views of Brisbane skyline. Groups of 10-500. Open-air terrace events. Live music and DJ events regularly hosted.

name: Cielo Rooftop
music_notes: Rooftop bar at 209 Brunswick Street. Alcohol licence until 10pm (extension available). PA system and music speakers included. Outdoor covered garden lounge and skyline terrace. Suitable for smaller intimate events.

name: Hyatt Regency Brisbane – Hibiscus Room Terrace
music_notes: 4th-level outdoor terrace with panoramic views over Queen Street Mall and infinity pool. Rooftop cocktail event space. Live music-friendly for outdoor celebrations.

name: Brisbane Convention & Exhibition Centre (BCEC)
music_notes: Queensland's premier convention venue at South Bank. Multiple halls and meeting rooms. Fully equipped for large-scale corporate events, gala dinners, awards nights with live entertainment. Regularly hosts music concerts and gala events.

name: Royal International Convention Centre (Royal ICC)
music_notes: Located at Brisbane Showgrounds. Three flexible halls, heritage hardwood facade, operable ceiling grid. Hosts music festivals, gala dinners, corporate events with live entertainment. World-class catering onsite.

name: InterContinental Brisbane
music_notes: 2500sqm of meeting and event space across 15 function rooms. Grand Ballroom splits into 3 sections. Live music and bands commonly hosted for weddings and corporate galas.

name: Cherbon Waters
music_notes: Equestrian estate and garden wedding venue east of Brisbane. Permanent marquee reception beside lake. Acoustic and live music popular in outdoor garden setting.

name: OceanView Estates
music_notes: Vineyard estate 45km north of Brisbane with panoramic ocean views. Multiple ceremony and reception spaces. Onsite accommodation. Live music common at vineyard events.

name: Rainforest Gardens
music_notes: Garden wedding venue in Redlands with covered pavilion reception. Ceremony areas by lagoon deck surrounded by rainforest. Outdoor setting; acoustic music noted as popular.

name: Sirromet Winery
music_notes: Award-winning winery 45 minutes from Brisbane and Gold Coast. Three reception spaces: Lurleen's (high ceilings, exposed timber beams), Barrel Hall (cellar atmosphere), and Tuscan Terrace. Regular live music events at the winery. Multiple ceremony locations among vines and lagoon.

name: The Grandview Hotel
music_notes: Queensland's oldest licensed pub with sweeping Moreton Bay views. Ceremony and reception areas including Heritage Cleveland Room, marquee, and verandah. Historic venue; live entertainment heritage.

name: The Lighthouse Restaurant
music_notes: Waterfront venue at Cleveland Point overlooking Moreton Bay with North Stradbroke Island views. 30 minutes from Brisbane. Deck on edge of bay. Function manager on site. Live music accommodated.

name: Redland Bay Golf Club
music_notes: Golf club venue with bay views. Air-conditioned function room seats 120, plus new marquee on deck. Arbour and gazebo ceremony options. Live music and DJs hosted for receptions.

name: Hogan's Wellington Point
music_notes: Nautilus Function Room (Hampton-style, upstairs with Moreton Bay views) and Old Bill's Whisky Bar. Cocktail and seated configurations. Live music and entertainment accommodated.

name: Royal Queensland Yacht Squadron
music_notes: Waterfront venue on Moreton Bay at Manly marina. Flags Room (100 dinner), Girdis Room (230 seated / 300 cocktail) with balconies over harbour. Ceremony lawn for 150. Live music hosted regularly.

name: Moreton Bay Boat Club
music_notes: Waterfront venue on Scarborough Harbour overlooking Moreton Bay, 40 minutes north of Brisbane. Covered outdoor deck and spacious interior. Intimate to 120 guests. Live music accommodated.

name: Sandstone Point Hotel
music_notes: Award-winning waterfront hotel on Pumicestone Passage near Bribie Island. 5 ceremony locations, 3 indoor reception spaces, 3 outdoor deck spaces. Cellar Room hosts DJ and dance floor. Live music and DJ events regularly hosted.

name: Clear Mountain Lodge Spa & Vineyard (Mercure)
music_notes: Hinterland vineyard/spa lodge 35 minutes from Brisbane CBD. Serenity Room overlooking manicured gardens. Music must end by 12:00 AM. Min 40 / max 110 reception guests.

name: Spicers Clovelly Estate
music_notes: Luxury French provincial estate in Sunshine Coast Hinterland. 19 guest suites. Manicured gardens for ceremonies. Indoor dining room and outdoor marquee for up to 120 on front lawn. Live music commonly featured at this upscale venue.

name: Maleny Manor
music_notes: Secluded private estate with hinterland, rainforest and ocean views. Packages for 40-120 guests. Six suites for accommodation. Three ceremony locations. Live bands and musicians commonly booked for receptions at this estate.

name: Flaxton Gardens
music_notes: Award-winning Sunshine Coast Hinterland venue with coastal views. Winery is acoustically lined with mezzanine level for band/DJ setup. Reverse cycle air conditioning. DJ or musician included in some wedding packages. Excellent live music setup.

name: Yandina Station
music_notes: Iconic rustic estate with heritage barn and expansive grounds. Country charm with options for glamping accommodation. Live bands commonly hosted in heritage barn for receptions.

name: Palm Creek Estate
music_notes: Boutique coastal farm venue 10 mins from Peregian Beach, 20 mins from Noosa. Regular live music events on estate. Multiple alfresco terraces. Corporate events, weddings and retreats. Live music sets the tone at weekend events.

name: Sunshine Coast Function Centre
music_notes: Premier event destination at Caloundra RSL. Diamond Ballroom caters 1200 cocktail / 500 banquet. Also has Sapphire, Emerald and Gem rooms. Dance floor included. Live music and entertainment regularly hosted for weddings and corporate events.

name: Oaks Sunshine Coast Oasis Resort
music_notes: Coastal hotel with 6 versatile event spaces, tropical gardens and lotus lagoon ceremony site. Up to 220 guests across all spaces. Suitable for weddings and corporate conferences. Live music accommodated.

name: Twin Waters Golf Club
music_notes: Golf club with Hampton-style Clubhouse and immaculate greens on Sunshine Coast. Indoor and outdoor ceremony and reception spaces. 30-220 guests. Dedicated wedding planner. Live music hosted for receptions.

name: Noosa Boathouse
music_notes: Three-level floating boathouse on Noosa River. River Room has dedicated DJ/band space in floor plan. All live music and DJs must conclude by 11:00pm due to unique riverside location. Dance floor hire available ($400-600).

name: Secrets on the Lake
music_notes: Treehouse accommodation retreat by Lake Baroon. Intimate weddings 4-80 guests. Multiple venues: Lakehouse (30), Dining on the Deck (70), Hideaway (10-20), Gallery (30). Boutique luxury venue; intimate acoustic music preferred over full bands given size.

name: Sunshine Beach Surf Lifesaving Club
music_notes: Coastal venue on dunes of Sunshine Beach near Noosa. Ocean views. 30-180 guests. Indoor and outdoor options. Customisable packages. Live music and entertainment hosted.

name: Goodwater Ridge Weddings & Events
music_notes: European-inspired private estate near Maleny. Indoor and outdoor ceremony and reception spaces. Exclusive use venue – blank canvas. Live music-friendly indoor spaces.

name: Glass House Country Weddings
music_notes: Multiple exclusive-use rustic venues with Glass House Mountain views. Small boutique weddings 2-50 guests. All-inclusive packages. Intimate acoustic music preferred; venue size limits full band setups.

name: Southport Yacht Club
music_notes: Spectacular waterfront venue overlooking 300-berth superyacht marina and Broadwater. 50-300 guests. Private beach. Bespoke wedding and event packages. Live bands and DJs regularly hosted.

name: Sheraton Grand Mirage Resort Gold Coast
music_notes: 5-star beachfront resort. Grand Ballroom with chandeliers. Australian Wedding Awards 2023 winner for Best Wedding Venue Resort Hotel. Live bands and entertainment standard for weddings.

name: JW Marriott Gold Coast Resort & Spa
music_notes: Lagoon and beachfront resort. JW Grand Ballroom (715sqm, pillarless, high ceilings) plus Lagoon Gallery and Tamborine Gallery. 11 event venues. Live music and entertainment hosted at all major events.

name: Hilton Surfers Paradise
music_notes: Grand Ballroom 250sqm. Overlooks golden shores. Flexible layout for cocktail or banquet style. Live entertainment and bands commonly hosted for weddings and corporate events.

name: The Star Gold Coast
music_notes: Premier casino and event centre. Event Centre Ballroom is flexible for cocktail reception 1800 or banquet 1040. Major concerts and live entertainment regularly hosted. Purpose-built for large-scale productions.

name: Gold Coast Convention and Exhibition Centre (GCCEC)
music_notes: Largest regional convention centre in Australia (10,000sqm). 22 modern flexible spaces with natural light and Gold Coast skyline views. Main arena, four exhibition halls. Hosts major concerts, gala dinners, corporate conventions with live entertainment.

name: SkyPoint Observation Deck
music_notes: Q1 building's 77th-floor observation deck with 360-degree coastal views. 50-240 guests. Unique event hire space. Live acoustic music and DJs hosted for cocktail functions.

name: Vibe Hotel Gold Coast
music_notes: Contemporary hotel in Surfers Paradise. Rooftop terrace for outdoor ceremonies overlooking Nerang River and Gold Coast Hinterland. Live music and DJs hosted for weddings.

name: Waterside Events at Currumbin RSL
music_notes: Waterfront function venue at Currumbin RSL. 50-350 guests. Live bands and DJs regularly hosted.

name: Kirra Beach House
music_notes: 30-250 guests. Late night alcohol and music licence available. Coastal beachside venue. Live music-friendly with extended licence option.

name: InterContinental Sanctuary Cove Resort
music_notes: Resort hotel at Sanctuary Cove marina. 2-300 guests. Multiple ballroom and garden ceremony spaces. Live music and entertainment hosted for weddings and corporate events.

name: The Bower Estate
music_notes: 120-acre estate in Numinbah Valley. World Heritage rainforest, rolling hills. 40-250 guests. Described by professional musicians as having exceptional acoustics and atmosphere for live music. 45 minutes from Gold Coast CBD.

name: Cedar Creek Estate
music_notes: Vineyard and winery atop Tamborine Mountain. Non-denominational chapel and garden arbour. Cedar Room (up to 110) overlooks vineyards with space for dance floor and DJ booth. Live music accommodated.

name: Albert River Wines
music_notes: Scenic Rim vineyard. Auchenflower Ballroom (largest space, 150 guests) plus Tamborine House homestead with covered deck. Chapel Garden (60 guests), Fig Tree. 15-150 guests across four ceremony and three reception spaces. Live music welcome.

name: O'Reilly's Canungra Valley Vineyards
music_notes: Vineyard 40 minutes from Gold Coast. Marquee (250 guests), wine cellar, historic Killowen homestead ballroom (100 guests). Creekside ceremony locations. 200-250 guests cocktail style. Live music hosted for receptions.

name: Sarabah Vineyard Estate
music_notes: Vineyard near Lamington National Park. Ceremony among vines, rustic jetty, olive groves or heart-shaped dam. Marquee for larger gatherings or European-designed chalet (seats 70). Live music and entertainment hosted.

name: Kooroomba Vineyard and Lavender Farm
music_notes: Award-winning vineyard and lavender farm. Architecturally designed restaurant and chapel. Dining room for small or large weddings, terrace overlooking lavender fields for cocktail receptions. Live music hosted.

name: Spicers Hidden Vale
music_notes: 12,000-acre oasis 40 minutes from Ipswich. Historic homestead seats 120, rustic barn seats 80, outdoor courtyard 90 guests. Marquee reception up to 150. Relaxed country wedding style. Live music hosted at homestead receptions.

name: Gabbinbar Homestead
music_notes: Destination wedding venue on 13-acre estate in Toowoomba. 160-year-old gardens. All-inclusive exclusive use. Ceremony areas ideal for acoustic performances; reception hall with natural reverb described as excellent for live vocals. 90 minutes from Brisbane.

name: Preston Peak Winery
music_notes: Award-winning winery in Darling Downs mountain ranges near Toowoomba. All-weather Wedding Tree Pavilion and outdoor ceremony options. Regular live music events including jazz quartet. Executive chef, sommelier service. International-calibre live entertainment hosted.

name: Burke and Wills Hotel Toowoomba
music_notes: Heritage hotel in Toowoomba CBD. Function rooms and ballroom for weddings and corporate events. Live music hosted for receptions and events.

name: Ipswich Events and Entertainment Centre
music_notes: Turf Club function venue 30 minutes from Brisbane, 1 hour from Toowoomba. Grange Lounge (260 seated), multiple other spaces from 40 to 500. Race track backdrop. Live entertainment and DJ setups hosted regularly.

name: Woodlands of Marburg
music_notes: Heritage-listed 250-acre country estate near Ipswich. Multiple reception venues: mansion private dining room (26), sandstone cellar (26), larger function spaces up to 300. Heritage chapel. Live music hosted.

name: Workshops Rail Museum
music_notes: Unique heritage venue with steam locomotive centrepiece. Moving Goods Hall (300 cocktail / 180 seated) with 11-metre ceilings. Original Dining Hall (200 guests). Live music and entertainment well-suited to the dramatic industrial heritage space.

name: Logan Entertainment Centre
music_notes: Logan's premier function venue. World-class facility with state-of-the-art event technology, five-star kitchen, multipurpose auditorium and intimate meeting rooms. Caters 70-450 banquet style. Full catering service. Live entertainment hosted including concerts and gala events.

name: Hampton Estate Wines
music_notes: Vineyard on Tamborine Mountain with incredible views. Spaces include whiskey bar, outdoor green, Hampton house, and The Glasshouse (100 guests). Accommodation for up to 16 onsite. Bespoke experience – live music accommodated.

name: Dusty Hill Vineyard
music_notes: South Burnett vineyard with heritage-style wedding chapel. Reception in The Cooperage (open sides, garden and lake views) and Prendergast's Irish Tavern. Explicitly offers 'fantastic selection of live entertainment, from chamber musicians through to rock and blues'. Live music is a core offering.

name: Noosa Waterfront Restaurant
music_notes: Waterfront restaurant on Noosa River surrounded by Moreton Bay Fig trees. 120 seated / 150 cocktail. Intimate and unique waterfront setting. Live music accommodated.

name: Blackbird Brisbane
music_notes: Waterside restaurant and bar in Brisbane CBD. 12-220 guests. Contemporary event space for weddings and corporate events. Live music accommodated.

name: Rydges Hotel South Bank
music_notes: Hotel in South Bank precinct with multiple event spaces. Waterfront location. Live music and entertainment hosted for weddings and corporate events.

name: Voco Brisbane City Centre
music_notes: Contemporary riverside hotel. Natural light and vibrant city backdrop. Cocktail 400, banquet 450, theatre 756. Live music hosted for corporate events and galas.

name: Summergrove Estate
music_notes: Hinterland estate near Gold Coast/Northern NSW border. Spacious reception barn with perfect sound acoustics. Ocean and mountain views. Described by musicians as a venue where live music 'never misses' at golden hour. Highly recommended for live bands.

name: Rosewood Estate
music_notes: Horse and cattle property on Gold Coast hinterland plateau. Views from South Stradbroke Island to Coolangatta. 50-200 guests. Semi-permanent clear marquee. Preferred supplier list. Curfew not publicly listed.

name: Balancing Heart Vineyard
music_notes: Contemporary vineyard with Sunset Pavilion event space in heart of vineyard. Weddings, elopements, private functions. Romantic outdoor setting. Live music accommodated.

name: Flame Hill Vineyard
music_notes: Vineyard at highest point of Montville on Blackall Range. Two distinct ceremony locations. Wine and food matching reception experience. Hinterland views. Live acoustic and small band setups common.

name: Walkabout Creek
music_notes: Native wildlife centre with natural bush setting. Rustic and boho-style weddings. Live acoustic music described as 'dreamy by the water's edge'. Popular Brisbane nature wedding venue.

name: Mo's Desert Clubhouse
music_notes: Unique event space at Burleigh Heads. 20-220 guests. Distinctive venue with live music-friendly layout.

name: COAST Gold Coast
music_notes: Rooftop bar and event space in central Surfers Paradise. Exclusive hire up to 250 guests, rooftop terrace 180 guests. Live music and DJ events regularly hosted.

name: Parkwood Weddings
music_notes: Purpose-built wedding and function venue in Gold Coast. 40-300 guests. Indoor and outdoor ceremony spaces. Live music and DJ setups for receptions.

name: Shambala Estate
music_notes: Private estate on Tamborine Mountain. 20-160 guests. Hinterland gardens. Live music accommodated in estate setting.

name: Colliston Farm
music_notes: Farm venue near Gold Coast. 3-100 guests. Rustic outdoor setting. Acoustic and small live music setups popular.

name: Heritage Estate Winery
music_notes: Granite Belt vineyard near Stanthorpe/Toowoomba region. Vineyard ceremony area (100 guests). Premium wines with cultural and dietary-accommodating menus. Live music at vineyard events.

name: Kwila Lodge
music_notes: Hinterland lodge venue near Gold Coast. 40-160 guests. Lush garden setting. Live music accommodated.
